decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (I), review_item (bid_comparison), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (two bids received, Horizonte competitive and local), timestamp (2026-03-19T14:00:00-07:00, ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_paco), route_to (Paco), sync_to_asana (false).
